entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by high base saturation and leaching, found in the semiarid tropics of India

entities.name: SEMIARID TROPICS
entities.description: A climatic region characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality of land caused by human activities or natural processes

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The displacement of the upper layer of soil

entities.name: NUTRIENT LOSS
entities.description: The depletion of essential nutrients from the soil

entities.name: RUNOFF
entities.description: The flow of water that occurs when excess stormwater runs off the land surface

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area of land

entities.name: SOIL MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Techniques used to maintain and improve soil health and productivity

entities.name: TILLAGE
entities.description: The agricultural practice of preparing soil by mechanical agitation

entities.name: MULCH
entities.description: The practice of covering soil with a layer of organic or inorganic material

entities.name: ROTATIONAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: The practice of growing different crops in succession on the same land

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food, feed, or fiber

entities.name: LAND RESOURCE PROTECTION
entities.description: Strategies to prevent land degradation and preserve soil quality

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Alfisol study was conducted

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A chemical element essential for plant growth, measured in soil and sediment

entities.name: CARBON
entities.description: A chemical element essential for soil organic matter, measured in soil and sediment

entities.name: ENRICHMENT RATIOS
entities.description: The ratio of nutrient concentration in eroded sediment compared to the original soil

entities.name: ORGANIC ADDITIONS
entities.description: The application of organic materials to soil to improve fertility

entities.name: FARMYARD MANURE
entities.description: A type of organic addition consisting of decomposed animal waste

entities.name: RICE STRAW
entities.description: A type of organic addition consisting of leftover rice stalks

entities.name: PERENNIAL PASTURE
entities.description: Plants that live for more than two years, used for grazing

entities.name: ANNUAL CROPS
entities.description: Plants that complete their life cycle in one growing season

entities.name: GROUNDWATER
entities.description: Water held underground in the soil or in pores and crevices in rock
